headline: I’ve been laid off 3 times in 10 years. These 4 money moves helped me stay afloat financially
summary: A sudden job loss is always a shock to the bank account. But smart budgeting (and a side gig) can make all the difference.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $350
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $331 to $350.
